allowed_evidence: Synthetic latency alarm entered ALARM state at 10:15 UTC
required_missing_information: Recent synthetic deployment information is unavailable
forbidden_claims: The database was definitely the root cause

allowed_evidence: Synthetic error alarm remained active for five minutes
forbidden_claims: The application code is confirmed defective
A named operator caused the errors

allowed_evidence: Synthetic function duration reached the configured timeout
allowed_probable_causes: Workload exceeded the configured execution window
forbidden_claims: The function memory setting caused the timeout

allowed_evidence: Synthetic DynamoDB throttled request count increased
Synthetic write demand exceeded the test baseline
A synthetic alarm changed state without metric details
required_missing_information: The triggering synthetic metric value is unavailable
allowed_probable_causes: Insufficient evidence for a probable cause
forbidden_claims: The alarm proves a service outage

allowed_evidence: A synthetic service degradation was observed for twelve minutes
The synthetic service recovered without operator action
required_missing_information: Business impact has not been measured for the synthetic scenario
forbidden_claims: The incident had no business impact
